item.text: I’ll review only the working-tree changes and their surrounding credential semantics, without running the test suite.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "git status --short && git diff -- bin/lib/onboard.js scripts/setup.sh package-lock.json && sed -n '1,120p' test/credential-exposure.test.js && rg -n \"--credential|from-existing|NVIDIA_API_KEY\" README.md docs scripts bin test -g '"'!package-lock.json'"'"

/bin/zsh -lc "git status --short && git diff -- bin/lib/onboard.js scripts/setup.sh package-lock.json && sed -n '1,120p' test/credential-exposure.test.js && rg -n \"--credential|from-existing|NVIDIA_API_KEY\" README.md docs scripts bin test -g '"'!package-lock.json'"'"

item.text: The production change uses OpenShell’s name-only credential lookup consistently. I’m checking the staged/unstaged split and minimum OpenShell compatibility for any behavioral regression.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "git diff --cached -- test/credential-exposure.test.js bin/lib/onboard.js scripts/setup.sh; rg -n -- \"--credential|from-existing|NVIDIA_API_KEY\" README.md docs scripts bin test -g '"'!package-lock.json'"' 2>/dev/null | head -240; rg -n \"MIN.*OPENSHELL|minimum.*OpenShell|0\\.0\\.[0-9]+\" bin scripts test | head -120; nl -ba bin/lib/onboard.js | sed -n '802,820p'; nl -ba scripts/setup.sh | sed -n '35,58p;128,142p'"

/bin/zsh -lc "git diff --cached -- test/credential-exposure.test.js bin/lib/onboard.js scripts/setup.sh; rg -n -- \"--credential|from-existing|NVIDIA_API_KEY\" README.md docs scripts bin test -g '"'!package-lock.json'"' 2>/dev/null | head -240; rg -n \"MIN.*OPENSHELL|minimum.*OpenShell|0\\.0\\.[0-9]+\" bin scripts test | head -120; nl -ba bin/lib/onboard.js | sed -n '802,820p'; nl -ba scripts/setup.sh | sed -n '35,58p;128,142p'"
